description.value: Price 16,150 gp; Slot armor; CL 12th; Weight 20 lbs.; Aura strong abjuration DESCRIPTION This set of +2 elven chain grants its wearer a +4 resistance bonus on saving throws against spells, spell-like abilities, and other effects created by worshipers and minions of a specific demon lord, chosen when the armor is created. Against such foes, the armor’s enhancement bonus increases to +4. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 10,650 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells detect evil, resistance
